arguments.prompt: Create a compact reliquary surveillance drone pixel art game sprite for MAUSOLEUM ENGINE. It should feel like a miniature descendant of the Warden Angel, not a cute robot. Oversized thin halo ring, central cyan lens, compact white ceramic shell, gilded faceplate, small deep-blue lower point, tiny wing-like side plates, elegant cold ceremonial threat, readable after normalization to 16x16. Centered transparent background, animation-ready, no scenery, no text, no UI.

negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3D render, anime illustration, painterly blur, smooth gradients, noisy dithering, messy antialiasing, chibi exaggeration, generic fantasy goblin, generic king, generic knight, cute toy drone, sci-fi spaceship, cyberpunk neon overload, gore, blood, exposed organs, self-harm, copied sprite, existing game character, logo, text, UI, background scene
